# Prasad Kavuri
> Director, AI Platform & Agentic Solutions at Zip | Enterprise AI Platforms | Chicago
Contact: vbkpkavuri@gmail.com | LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/pkavuri/ | Portfolio: https://www.prasadkavuri.com | Book: https://calendly.com/vbkpkavuri
Positioning: AI Platform Executive — not an individual contributor profile
Location: Chicago, IL
GitHub: https://github.com/prasad-kavuri/prasad-portfolio
Last-Updated: 2026-07-16

## CURRENT ROLE
Director, AI Platform & Agentic Solutions, Zip (July 2026 - Present)
Leading enterprise AI platform strategy and agentic AI capability development at Zip,
partnering across Engineering, Product, Data, Risk, and Security to operationalize AI
safely and responsibly at scale in a regulated financial-services environment.

## PRIOR ROLES
Head of AI Engineering, Krutrim (March 2025 - June 2026) |
Senior Director of Engineering, Ola (September 2023 - February 2025) |
Head of Infrastructure and Services, HERE Technologies (May 2023 - September 2023)

## SPECIALIZATION
- Agentic AI Orchestration
- LLM Routing & Cost Optimization
- AI Governance & HITL Systems
- RAG Pipelines & Vector Search
- Multi-Agent Systems
- Drift Monitoring & Eval Gating
- AI FinOps
- Enterprise Platform Engineering
- Model Context Protocol (MCP)
- Browser WASM / WebGPU Inference
- Edge AI & Sovereign AI
- AI Runtime Engineering (speculative decoding, KV/prefix cache, batching, quantization)

## VERIFIED IMPACT METRICS
- 200+ engineers led across global teams
- 70% AI infrastructure cost reduction (Ola Maps)
- $10M+ revenue impact from AI systems
- 300-seat call center automated via agentic workflows (Krutrim)
- 35M+ POIs indexed on enterprise mapping platform (Ola Maps)
- 13 languages supported across Indic + global AI systems
- 13,000+ B2B enterprise customers enabled
- 50% latency reduction via intelligent model routing
- 16 production AI demos, all live

## PLATFORM ARCHITECTURE
14-layer AI platform execution flow documented on portfolio homepage:
User Intent → Agent Orchestration → Memory & Context → Tool/MCP → Model Router →
Inference → Evaluation → Guardrails → Observability → Drift Monitor →
FinOps → Audit Trail → Human Approval → Business Outcome
URL: https://www.prasadkavuri.com/#ai-architecture

## GEOGRAPHIC REACH
- Based: Chicago, IL, USA
- Currently: Director, AI Platform & Agentic Solutions at Zip (regulated financial-services environment)
- APAC: Built India's first agentic AI platform at Krutrim (Bangalore); led Ola Maps engineering (India + US)
- EMEA: Led global engineering teams at HERE Technologies (Chicago + Europe)
- Global teams: 200+ engineers across North America, India, and Europe

## DEMOS (16 total — all live)
Flagship:      /demos/evaluation-showcase  — LLM-as-Judge eval, drift, HITL, CI gating
Agent catalog: /agent-marketplace          — 15 agents filterable by capability tier
Full catalog:  /demos

Core AI Infrastructure:
- /demos/rag-pipeline          — Browser WASM RAG with Transformers.js
- /demos/llm-router            — Multi-model routing with live cost/latency stats
- /demos/vector-search         — Semantic search with UMAP visualization
- /demos/browser-native-ai-skill — On-device AI via Gemini Nano

Agentic Systems:
- /demos/multi-agent           — Analyzer → Researcher → Strategist with HITL
- /demos/mcp-demo              — MCP protocol flow with JSON-RPC inspector
- /demos/agent-auth            — auth.md agent identity: anon → email → Bearer
- /demos/edge-agent-collaboration — Edge BERT NER + HITL gate + Groq cloud
- /demos/enterprise-control-plane — RBAC, spend limits, observability dashboard
- /demos/storm-research        — STORM-style multi-perspective research synthesis
- /demos/world-generation      — Spatial AI + LLM query layer, Three.js

AI Applications:
- /demos/portfolio-assistant   — Streaming RAG-grounded assistant
- /demos/resume-generator      — JD parsing + fit scoring + ATS resume
- /demos/multimodal            — Florence-2 WebGPU image captioning
- /demos/quantization          — INT8 vs FP32 ONNX benchmark

## MCP TOOL ENDPOINT (callable by AI agents)
Endpoint:   POST https://www.prasadkavuri.com/api/mcp-demo
Protocol:   MCP-compatible tool calling (JSON, no auth required)
Tools available:
  get_experience(company)              — work history by company
  search_skills(category)             — skills by category (ai_ml, cloud_infrastructure, leadership, industry, core)
  calculate_fit_score(required_skills, role_title) — match score for a job role
  get_achievements(company?)          — quantified impact metrics
Usage: POST { "query": "What is Prasad's current role and experience with agentic AI?" }
This endpoint is designed for recruiter agents and AI assistants to query the profile programmatically.
